mappings.evidence: git-show-diff: src/cli/mod.rs clap Command derive includes `version = env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION")`; this is a static attribute referencing Cargo manifest version, not a runtime test. Verified via `git diff --name-only HEAD` showing src/cli/mod.rs changed, and via attribution reasoning that the clap derive macro renders `--version` at compile time from CARGO_PKG_VERSION (no test suite involved).

mappings.criterion: No behavioral risk outside the version-handling clause
mappings.evidence: structural: typed-AST inspection — the only modified line in src/cli/mod.rs is the `#[clap(...)]` attribute; no statement, expression, function body, or signature changed outside the Command derive. Compared against git HEAD baseline snapshot.
